guidance_text: Focus first on execution efficiency inside the main execution path, including test efficiency, parallelization, flake reduction, and execution simplification.
guidance_reference: Android Developers — Build-managed devices: https://developer.android.com/studio/test/managed-devices | Parsazadeh et al., 2026 profile paper — RQ3/RQ4 operational profile and bottleneck findings | GitHub Docs — Dependency caching: https://docs.github.com/en/actions/concepts/workflows-and-actions/dependency-caching

guidance_text: Reduce variability across entry/setup and execution-path work first, then inspect the residual tail contributors.
guidance_reference: Parsazadeh et al., 2026 profile paper — RQ3/RQ4 operational profile and bottleneck findings | GitHub Docs — Dependency caching: https://docs.github.com/en/actions/concepts/workflows-and-actions/dependency-caching | GitHub Docs — GitHub-hosted runners: https://docs.github.com/actions/using-github-hosted-runners/about-github-hosted-runners

guidance_text: Reduce provider-side execution cost and stabilize the sustained execution path before secondary tail tuning.
guidance_reference: Firebase — Test Lab overview: https://firebase.google.com/docs/test-lab | Firebase — Test Lab command line: https://firebase.google.com/docs/test-lab/android/command-line | Firebase — Analyze Test Lab results: https://firebase.google.com/docs/test-lab/android/analyzing-results

guidance_text: Inspect both the bespoke execution path and the heavier completion side, then standardize the custom orchestration where feasible.
guidance_reference: Parsazadeh et al., 2026 profile paper — RQ3/RQ4 operational profile and bottleneck findings | Tahir et al., JSS 2023 — Test flakiness’ causes, detection, impact and responses | GitHub Docs — Dependency caching: https://docs.github.com/en/actions/concepts/workflows-and-actions/dependency-caching

guidance_text: Reduce setup/orchestration delay before invocation and stabilize early-entry work.
guidance_reference: GitHub Docs — Dependency caching: https://docs.github.com/en/actions/concepts/workflows-and-actions/dependency-caching | GitHub Docs — GitHub-hosted runners: https://docs.github.com/actions/using-github-hosted-runners/about-github-hosted-runners

guidance_text: Reduce setup/orchestration delay before invocation and simplify early custom preparation work.

guidance_text: Minimize pre-invocation setup and keep the entry path lightweight and reproducible.
guidance_reference: GitHub Docs — Dependency caching: https://docs.github.com/en/actions/concepts/workflows-and-actions/dependency-caching | GitHub Docs — GitHub-hosted runners: https://docs.github.com/actions/using-github-hosted-runners/about-github-hosted-runners | Android Developers — Build-managed devices: https://developer.android.com/studio/test/managed-devices

guidance_text: Reduce entry/provisioning delay before the execution path begins, especially provider-side startup overhead.

guidance_text: Stabilize entry/setup variability and reduce execution-path cost; then inspect the remaining residual tail.
guidance_reference: Parsazadeh et al., 2026 profile paper — RQ3/RQ4 operational profile and bottleneck findings | GitHub Docs — Dependency caching: https://docs.github.com/en/actions/concepts/workflows-and-actions/dependency-caching | GitHub Docs — GitHub-hosted runners: https://docs.github.com/actions/using-github-hosted-runners/about-github-hosted-runners

guidance_text: Improve the main execution path first because the completion profile is dominated by execution time.
guidance_reference: Android Developers — Build-managed devices: https://developer.android.com/studio/test/managed-devices | Parsazadeh et al., 2026 profile paper — RQ3/RQ4 operational profile and bottleneck findings | GitHub Docs — Dependency caching: https://docs.github.com/en/actions/concepts/workflows-and-actions/dependency-caching

guidance_text: Reduce provider-side execution cost and the longest sustained-execution segments first.
guidance_reference: Firebase — Test Lab overview: https://firebase.google.com/docs/test-lab | Firebase — Test Lab command line: https://firebase.google.com/docs/test-lab/android/command-line | Firebase — Analyze Test Lab results: https://firebase.google.com/docs/test-lab/android/analyzing-results

guidance_text: Reduce the completion-tail work first because the end-to-end profile is slowed most by the post-execution segment.

guidance_text: Inspect usable-verdict and success patterns first, then check whether setup/runtime instability is degrading outcome quality.

guidance_text: Inspect usable-verdict and success patterns first, especially around failure-dominant custom paths and brittle bespoke orchestration.

guidance_text: Preserve the strong usable/success profile by focusing on failure prevention in the execution path and maintaining stable configuration.
